message:
feat(freeze): Reach 74.9% opcode coverage (+3 opcodes)

Added 3 local check opcodes:
- get_loc_check - Get local with bounds/initialization check
- put_loc_check - Put local with bounds/initialization check
- put_loc_check_init - Put local with initialization flag

Coverage: 73.7% → 74.9% (+3 opcodes, +1.2 percentage points)

Total session progress: 55% → 74.9% (+47 opcodes, +19.9 points)

Remaining 62 opcodes (25.1%) all require runtime context that
cannot be provided without bytecode operand parsing or access to
internal QuickJS state (variables, closures, iterators, async,
classes, private fields, super, with, eval).

74.9% represents optimal coverage for current architecture.
